working.title: Enter Results
working.noGames: No games available. Please create games in the web service first.

overview.title: Overview
overview.empty: No results yet in this session

settings.title: Settings
settings.logoutMessage: You will be signed out of your account. Any results that have not yet been synced will be lost. Make sure all data has been uploaded before signing out.
settings.clearSessionMessage: All locally stored results for this session will be permanently deleted — including any that have not yet been synced to the server.
settings.newSessionMessage:
The current session will be closed and a new one started. All future results will be assigned to the new session. Previously entered results are not affected.

Note: This also happens automatically if no new result is entered for 24 hours.
settings.permissionMessage: Please allow access to the media library.

push.payoffBody: A new payoff has been executed for your club.

shortcutMenu.empty:
No shortcuts configured.
Pin parts in Settings to use them here.

error.insufficientBalance: Not enough KNC. Please top up your balance.

guide.title: Game Guide
guide.basicsBody:
5 reels · 3 rows · 10 paylines

Matching symbols must appear left to right on an active payline. At least 3 consecutive symbols pay out. The Kegel (🎳) acts as both Wild and Scatter.
guide.wildBody: The Kegel (🎳) substitutes for all other symbols on paylines and completes winning combinations.
guide.scatterBody:
3 or more Kegel (🎳) anywhere on the reels trigger 10 free spins. All free spins are played at zero cost.

On average, free spins are triggered every ~53 paid spins.
guide.expandingBody:
At the start of free spins, a random expanding symbol is chosen and displayed.

If that symbol appears on enough reels, it expands to fill those entire reels and pays as a scatter — no payline needed, just by reel count, multiplied by bet and active lines.

Scatter wins use a dedicated bonus multiplier table. Individual payouts are smaller than an equivalent payline hit, but the free spins round can deliver many such wins in a row.
guide.scatterPayTableNote: Multiplier × bet per line × active lines
guide.thresholdBody:
High-value symbols (🍺 🧈 🍟 🍕) expand from just 2 reels and pay scatter from 2 reels.

Low-value symbols (🥨 🥐 🍇 🍐 🍓) require at least 3 reels to expand and pay scatter.
guide.retriggerBody: If 3 or more Kegel (🎳) land during free spins, 10 additional free spins are awarded immediately. The chosen expanding symbol stays the same.

double.title: Double or Nothing
double.pressToFlip: Press SPIN to flip the coin
